name: Thai Pork Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup lightly packed cilantro leaves, coarsely chopped
1/2 large red onion, cut into thin slivers
1/2 cup lightly salted roasted cashews or peanuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cabbage, cilantro and mint in a large bowl; set aside.
2. Cut pork chops into 1/4 inch thick strips.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add pork, onion, nuts, salt, and cayenne pepper to the skillet.
5. Cook and stir for 2 minutes, then remove from heat.
6. Stir in lime juice.
7. Spoon the pork mixture over cabbage; toss well to coat.
8. Garnish with lime wedges, onion strips, and cilantro sprigs.
Makes 5 main dish servings.
